symmetry.mechanism: Delete fake directional freedom by testing whether interchange leaves the live law unchanged.
symmetry.controller_question: What asymmetry is real, and what asymmetry is only coordinate costume?
wake_when: Two sides, roles, or branches look comparable
The target punishes imbalance or drift
A swap test could kill fake distinctions cheaply
symmetry.cheapest_honest_touch: Try one lawful swap or balancing normalization and see what burden survives.
symmetry.anti_pattern: Do not call something symmetric just because it looks visually balanced.

limit_boundary.mechanism: Squeeze slack out of the system until the hidden rule-change seam becomes visible.
limit_boundary.controller_question: Which boundary, degenerate case, or first crack exposes the controlling law earliest?
wake_when: The object still feels too thick
A denominator, support, or degree of freedom is causing fog
Edge behavior should preserve the same controller more honestly
limit_boundary.cheapest_honest_touch: Push one variable to zero, coincidence, tangency, or saturation and inspect what remains rigid.
limit_boundary.anti_pattern: Do not force a boundary that changes the problem rather than revealing it.

conservation.mechanism: Rewrite visible motion or clutter as one conserved ledger, net flow, or invariant aggregate.
conservation.controller_question: What total, balance, or invariant still owns truth while the local story moves around?
wake_when: Things seem to appear, disappear, or circulate
Local motion obscures a stable total
Validation depends on what can lawfully survive after transformation
conservation.cheapest_honest_touch: Name one total account and check whether every local change pays into it consistently.
conservation.anti_pattern: Do not call a vibe 'conservation' unless you can say what is actually conserved.

projection.mechanism: Read a thick object through a thinner lawful shadow that still preserves the hinge.
projection.controller_question: What smaller carrier, section, or shadow still determines the target exactly?
wake_when: The object has more dimensions than the answer seems to need
Only one readout, slice, or direction seems load-bearing
A global object could be replaced by an interface quantity
projection.cheapest_honest_touch: Project onto one axis, section, or interface value and test whether exact closure survives there.
projection.anti_pattern: Do not project away a coordinate that still owns legality or reconstruction.

assignment.mechanism: Probe a route with one controlled value choice that pressures the live mechanism cheaply.
assignment.controller_question: Which representative value or anchor exposes the route fastest without changing the law?
wake_when: A general symbolic story is too loose
One special point could separate rival explanations cheaply
A parameter still hides the center of the problem
assignment.cheapest_honest_touch: Plug one anchor value, coincidence, or named representative and see what law becomes rigid.
assignment.anti_pattern: Do not treat random plugging as assignment; the chosen value must be mechanism-revealing.

reverse.mechanism: Flip direction when the no-return law or legality owner is clearer from the finished side.
reverse.controller_question: Does the controller become thinner if the process is read backward rather than forward?
wake_when: Forward narration keeps too many fake freedoms alive
A no-return law is visible only after reversal
Construction is thicker than legality
reverse.cheapest_honest_touch: Rewrite one step from output back to source and inspect what freedom dies immediately.
reverse.anti_pattern: Do not reverse just to look clever; reverse only when it preserves the same controller more honestly.

picture.mechanism: Externalize a relation into a graph, diagram, corridor, or shape so illegal coexistence becomes visible.
picture.controller_question: Is the burden really spatial, relational, or flow-like rather than verbal?
wake_when: Adjacency or interaction is hard to hold verbally
Local legality may fail globally through crossings or collisions
A graph or shape could kill fake possibilities early
picture.cheapest_honest_touch: Draw one minimal object whose forbidden adjacencies or crossings are easier to see than to narrate.
picture.anti_pattern: Do not promote a picture to truth unless it cashes back into the exact target.

witness.mechanism: Use one hostile or separating case to kill fake lines early.
witness.controller_question: What is the cheapest concrete witness that splits the live candidates?
wake_when: Several routes still look plausible
Confidence is being carried by atmosphere rather than evidence
One seam can be touched directly
witness.cheapest_honest_touch: Construct one case, check, or counter-pressure that one route survives and another fails.
witness.anti_pattern: Do not keep broad explanation alive when one local witness could already decide.

state_split.mechanism: Compress a noisy process into the smallest exact state, quotient, or compatibility residue.
state_split.controller_question: What residue still decides legality, mergeability, or reconstruction after thinning?
wake_when: A history-shaped object still owns the burden
A local checker wants to become a global state object
The run still says 'then do DP' without exact state shape
state_split.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the smallest state coordinates that still decide the next legality or readout step.
state_split.anti_pattern: Do not compress for style; keep every coordinate that still owns truth.

compatibility.mechanism: Turn many locally legal pieces into one exact coexistence or merge object.
compatibility.controller_question: What hidden supply, overlap, or residue decides whether local choices can coexist globally?
wake_when: Many local witnesses look legal at once
The burden is web-shaped rather than corridor-shaped
The last missing object is a merge or coexistence rule
compatibility.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one compatibility carrier or merge law that can reject impossible local combinations.
compatibility.anti_pattern: Do not confuse local legality with joint realizability.

readout.mechanism: Force the current carrier to cash into the exact asked-medium readout rather than a nearby elegant surrogate.
readout.controller_question: What exact answer-side object, field, or certificate is still missing?
wake_when: The run sounds right but the final interface is still unnamed
A beautiful middle object is replacing exact closure
The asked medium is still untouched or cosmetic only
readout.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one explicit answer/readout dependency, field set, or certificate surface.
readout.anti_pattern: Do not stop at 'then combine' or 'then query'.

vector_difference_readout.mechanism: Read the target through one difference vector or displacement ledger rather than a full object family.
vector_difference_readout.controller_question: Is the answer owned by one difference or displacement readout rather than by the full ambient object?
wake_when: Relative movement matters more than absolute placement
A pairwise gap seems more stable than the whole story
vector_difference_readout.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the target directly in terms of one displacement or difference vector.
vector_difference_readout.anti_pattern: Do not keep full coordinate baggage if only relative differences matter.

common_value_compression.mechanism: Collapse many apparent parameters into one latent shared controller.
common_value_compression.controller_question: What single common value or latent quantity can replace many decorative local values?
wake_when: Several values are moving together under one hidden law
The same burden is repeated under different labels
common_value_compression.cheapest_honest_touch: Name one shared latent value and test whether the rest becomes bookkeeping.
common_value_compression.anti_pattern: Do not rename many distinct owners as one value if they still carry different constraints.

container_to_cross_section.mechanism: Replace a container story with the decisive section that actually controls it.
container_to_cross_section.controller_question: Which cross-section or slice still carries the whole burden?
wake_when: A volume, region, or container feels heavier than the answer needs
One section seems to control feasibility or measure
container_to_cross_section.cheapest_honest_touch: Cut one section and test whether the controller survives there exactly.
container_to_cross_section.anti_pattern: Do not keep the whole container if only one section owns the truth.

area_to_line_readout.mechanism: Read an area-like quantity through one line, gap, or support measure.
area_to_line_readout.controller_question: Is the spread really controlled by one line-level readout?
wake_when: A region's measure depends mostly on one gap or height
The object looks two-dimensional but the burden feels one-dimensional
area_to_line_readout.cheapest_honest_touch: Rewrite the area or spread through one line-controlled quantity.
area_to_line_readout.anti_pattern: Do not keep a full surface model when one gap or support already closes it.

matching_instead_of_probability.mechanism: Replace fuzzy probabilistic narration with an exact pairing or matching object.
matching_instead_of_probability.controller_question: Is this really a counting/matching problem disguised as probability talk?
wake_when: Randomness talk hides discrete structure
The real burden is allocation or pairing
matching_instead_of_probability.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one exact pairing or matching surrogate and compare what it preserves.
matching_instead_of_probability.anti_pattern: Do not stay in expectation/probability language if exact combinatorics is thinner.

grid_selection_permutation.mechanism: Collapse a grid or arrangement burden into one selection/permutation invariant.
grid_selection_permutation.controller_question: Is the real controller one order/selection law rather than the whole grid?
wake_when: A matrix or grid is present but only ordering seems load-bearing
A placement problem smells like a permutation constraint
grid_selection_permutation.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the burden as one order-selection object and test whether geometry drops out.
grid_selection_permutation.anti_pattern: Do not keep full grid detail if the legal structure is just ordering.

compare_without_calculating.mechanism: Separate routes by order, sign, or threshold without paying full computation cost.
compare_without_calculating.controller_question: Can one comparison decide the issue before full evaluation?
wake_when: You only need which side wins
An exact number is less important than order or sign
compare_without_calculating.cheapest_honest_touch: Ask one inequality, sign, or threshold-side question that the true route must answer.
compare_without_calculating.anti_pattern: Do not compute a full expression if one order comparison already decides the route.

dot_product_projection.mechanism: Use projection along one direction to turn geometry into scalar control.
dot_product_projection.controller_question: Which directional readout makes the object linear enough to read honestly?
wake_when: Direction matters more than full coordinates
A projection can expose the controlling range
dot_product_projection.cheapest_honest_touch: Project onto the controlling direction and inspect the scalar residue.
dot_product_projection.anti_pattern: Do not keep rotational clutter if one projection already owns the answer.

canonical_normalization.mechanism: Rewrite to a mother form whose laws are easier to inherit directly.
canonical_normalization.controller_question: What lawful normalization kills decorative variation without losing control?
wake_when: Equivalent forms are obscuring one shared law
A change of form can shrink the legal search space
canonical_normalization.cheapest_honest_touch: Normalize one representative and check whether the burden becomes family-level rather than instance-level.
canonical_normalization.anti_pattern: Do not normalize away a coordinate that still owns legality.

projection_readout.mechanism: Use a projected quantity as the final readout rather than merely as an intermediate view.
projection_readout.controller_question: Can the target be answered directly on the projected carrier?
wake_when: A projection already preserves the asked interface
The current carrier is nearly speakable after projection
projection_readout.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the exact readout directly on the projected carrier.
projection_readout.anti_pattern: Do not project and then rebuild the full object by habit.

dominant_mechanism_readout.mechanism: Read the outcome through the mechanism that actually dominates survival at the asked interface.
dominant_mechanism_readout.controller_question: Which mechanism still has the last real discretion over the observed result?
wake_when: Several mechanisms are locally real but one likely dominates
A broad story exists but the final authorizing layer is still unclear
dominant_mechanism_readout.cheapest_honest_touch: Write one readout that isolates the dominant surviving mechanism rather than the first visible one.
dominant_mechanism_readout.anti_pattern: Do not stop at the first true local mechanism if a later ceiling still decides the result.

local_seam_controls_global.mechanism: Use one local rule-change seam to control a wider global outcome.
local_seam_controls_global.controller_question: Is there one local seam whose law propagates farther than the surface story suggests?
wake_when: A global burden seems to hinge on one local break
A cheapest seam may separate whole route families
local_seam_controls_global.cheapest_honest_touch: Probe the seam and ask what global structure must follow if it holds there.
local_seam_controls_global.anti_pattern: Do not jump to global narrative before testing whether one seam actually controls it.

definition_as_direct_readout.mechanism: Use the exact definition itself as the readout surface instead of inventing extra machinery.
definition_as_direct_readout.controller_question: Does the answer already sit inside the exact object the definition names?
wake_when: A concept is already defined by the needed quantity
Extra derivation is adding shell rather than closure
definition_as_direct_readout.cheapest_honest_touch: Write the answer directly through the exact defining relation.
definition_as_direct_readout.anti_pattern: Do not build a second theory when the definition already exposes the readout.

symmetry_as_variable_killer.mechanism: Use symmetry not just as atmosphere but to eliminate explicit variables or branches.
symmetry_as_variable_killer.controller_question: Which degree of freedom becomes illegal or redundant after lawful symmetry identification?
wake_when: A variable survives only because equivalent roles were never quotiented
Symmetry could collapse an explicit scan
symmetry_as_variable_killer.cheapest_honest_touch: Identify the variable that dies once the symmetric roles are treated as one class.
symmetry_as_variable_killer.anti_pattern: Do not claim variable death until the symmetry preserves all active constraints.

boundary_as_route_finder.mechanism: Use the boundary not just as a check but as the route-finding surface itself.
boundary_as_route_finder.controller_question: What route only becomes visible once the object is pushed to its edge or first crack?
wake_when: Interior continuation is too foggy
The boundary preserves the same controller more sharply than the middle
boundary_as_route_finder.cheapest_honest_touch: Push directly to the edge case and read the route there before regrowing the interior.
boundary_as_route_finder.anti_pattern: Do not treat the boundary as optional decoration when it is the real route finder.

model_calling_before_derivation.mechanism: Call the likely object family or law before paying full derivation, then verify cheaply.
model_calling_before_derivation.controller_question: What lawful family should be tested as a serious candidate before brute continuation?
wake_when: A familiar structural family is strongly suggested
Testing a family hypothesis is cheaper than deriving blindly
model_calling_before_derivation.cheapest_honest_touch: Name one candidate family and hit it with one cheap falsification check.
model_calling_before_derivation.anti_pattern: Do not let family recognition replace verification.

special_value_probing.mechanism: Use one strategically chosen value to reveal the controller or kill a fake route.
special_value_probing.controller_question: Which special value sharpens the mechanism rather than merely simplifying arithmetic?
wake_when: A general route is too broad
One value can expose the anchor, symmetry, or failure seam
special_value_probing.cheapest_honest_touch: Probe the one value most likely to expose the live controller.
special_value_probing.anti_pattern: Do not confuse simplification values with mechanism-revealing values.

function_archetype_matching.mechanism: Match the current object to a function/archetype family whose laws shrink the search space immediately.
function_archetype_matching.controller_question: Which archetype does this object already belong to if I stop narrating its costume?
wake_when: The object looks custom but behaves like a known family
Family laws can kill many fake freedoms at once
function_archetype_matching.cheapest_honest_touch: State the archetype and test one law that should hold if the match is real.
function_archetype_matching.anti_pattern: Do not force a family match that only shares surface resemblance.
